sowingWindow: Use local nursery/transplanting calendar; avoid waterlogging during monsoon.
marketNote: High storage risk; weather can affect sale timing.

sowingWindow: Sow after useful monsoon rain when soil moisture is adequate.
marketNote: Good drought-tolerant option for light soils.

sowingWindow: Use short-duration varieties where monsoon window is uncertain.
marketNote: Pulse prices move with quality and moisture.

sowingWindow: Line sowing with low seed rate; avoid waterlogging.
marketNote: Oilseed price depends on processor demand and imports.

sowingWindow: Use disease-free seed tubers and avoid waterlogging; follow local cold-storage and variety guidance.
marketNote: High storage risk without cold storage; compare local mandi price with storage cost before holding.

sowingWindow: Check rainfall, soil moisture, and seed quality before sowing.
marketNote: Always verify current mandi price before selling.
